pi_items.source: verifier.py strictly checks for pci_checks >= 5 to award full points for Criterion 1.
export_result.sh checks for regex 'level="(1[0-9]|[2-9][0-9])"' and verifier.py awards full points for high_level.
verifier.py checks distinct_topics >= 2 which requires at least 2 distinct rules.
export_result.sh explicitly checks this path for the compliance report.
verifier.py explicitly checks if report_size >= 800 to award full points.
PASS_THRESHOLD = 65 is explicitly defined in verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: Verified the task requires the creation of synthetic PCI DSS compliance rules and configuration in Wazuh. The task expects an SCA policy YAML file with a minimum of 5 checks, at least 2 detection rules covering distinct PCI DSS violation categories (e.g. privilege access, auth failure, audit tamper) at severity level 10 or higher. Additionally, it requires a compliance report to be saved at /home/ga/Desktop/pci_compliance_report.txt with a minimum length of 800 characters. The pass threshold is explicitly 65 points.
